data.name: Moonripple Lake
data.detailed_description:
Anon and Suzie are moving to Moonripple Lake!

In the wake of his cratering crypto-gained net-worth, Anon is selling their apartment and moving to rent a house, so he might stave off the inevitable. Having to get a job. A genius decision? We'll find out.

In Moonripple Lake, Suzie and Anon will make new friends, bring in old ones, stumble onto mysteries, and go on adventures. Most importantly, they'll do all that while having lots of kinky sex!

Current Early Access state of the game:

  • Freeroam, choices, collectibles, gallery, special scenes, achievements!

  • Kinks: Exhibitionism, Sharing, Teasing, NTS, Voyeurism, Corruption

  • Story rich, with a diverse cast of characters!

  • 64 custom made songs, and gameplay laden with SFX!

  • 2000 renders!

  • OVER 100 animations!

  • 113200+ words, and 6+ hours of gameplay.

  • Free Roam
    At certain points as you progress through the story, you'll be able to explore your surroundings, and the town of Moonripple. You'll visit different locations and find hidden secrets.

  • Polaroids

    They're fun, spicy, sexy renders that you find by exploring the game in free-roam.
    There's a variety of polaroids and they all have different ways of getting to them.

  • Gallery
    The gallery holds polaroids that you find while exploring the game in free-roam.
    You can review them here, and check your progress on collecting them all.

    You can also revisit scenes from the game, and see other special content here in the gallery!

  • Achievements

    Go off the beaten path and get achievements, and more hidden polaroids to boot!

  • Make decisions
    Decisions affect Anon and Suzie's experiences, and the story.
    From small immediate results, to larger long lasting consequences!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: 1.8 GHz Dual Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9.0c compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 250 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2.4 GHz Quad Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 11 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10.10 (Yosemite) or later
  • 處理器: 1.8 GHz Intel Core 2 Duo or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible graphics card
  • 儲存空間: 250 MB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10.15 (Catalina) or later
  • 處理器: 2.4 GHz Intel Core i5 or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 compatible graphics card
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 18.04 or later / SteamOS 3.0 or later
  • 處理器: 1.8 GHz Dual Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible graphics card
  • 儲存空間: 250 MB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04 or later / Latest SteamOS version
  • 處理器: 2.4 GHz Quad Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 compatible graphics card
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
